display.purpose: Page titles and modal headers — one per region.

headline.purpose: Section headers and plan names inside panels.

body.purpose: Descriptions, forms, tables — max ~75ch in prose.

shadows.name: panel-rest
shadows.purpose: Default elevation for white panels and cards at rest.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Video cards and interactive tiles on hover.

shadows.name: badge-float
shadows.purpose: Score pills and platform badges on thumbnails.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main forward action — sign in, upgrade, confirm.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; color: #ffffff; background-color: #059669; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 24px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(24 24 27 / 0.05); transition: background-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #047857; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #10b981; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; color: #27272a; background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #fafafa; border-color: #6ee7b7; color: #064e3b; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #10b981; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: #18181b; background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #71717a; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #34d399; }

components.name: Nav Item Active
components.html: Главная
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #27272a; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 8px; transition: background-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background-color: #ecfdf5; color: #064e3b; } .ds-nav-item--active { background-color: #ecfdf5; color: #064e3b; } .ds-nav-icon { color: #059669; display: flex; }

components.name: Video Card
components.description: Primary content tile in search and trend grids.
components.css: .ds-video-card { display: block; width: 100%; text-align: left; background: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 16px; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(24 24 27 / 0.05); overflow: hidden; transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-video-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(24 24 27 / 0.1); } .ds-video-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #10b981; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-video-thumb { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 3 / 4; background: rgb(228 228 231 / 0.8); } .ds-score { position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgb(167 243 208 / 0.9); padding: 4px 8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-score--high { background: #059669; color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Plan Card
components.css: .ds-plan-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #ffffff, rgb(250 250 250 / 0.8)); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(24 24 27 / 0.05); } .ds-plan-title { margin: 0; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: #18181b; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-plan-price { margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #71717a; } .ds-plan-cta { margin-top: 16px; width: 100%; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #ffffff; background: #059669; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-plan-cta:hover { background: #047857; }

components.name: Token Badge
components.css: .ds-token-badge { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid #a7f3d0; border-radius: 12px; background: #ecfdf5; padding: 8px 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(6 78 59 / 0.05); } .ds-token-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #064e3b; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-token-value { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: #064e3b; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }

narrative.overview: Viral is a product dashboard for solo creators hunting short-form trends — not another social feed. The interface stays light, structured, and legible: a soft zinc shell frames white work surfaces while emerald signals action, success, and active wayfinding. Thumbnails and scripts are the focal point; chrome recedes. The personality is a friendly guide: warm enough to encourage, restrained enough to respect focus.
keyCharacteristics: Light shell + white panels — never cream/sand marketing warmth
Emerald as the sole accent for CTAs, active nav, and positive signals
Geist Sans for all UI; Geist Mono for code-like values when needed
Rounded corners (8–16px) with whisper shadows, not glass stacks
Video thumbnails carry visual energy; UI does not compete

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Emerald is the only chromatic accent for UI chrome. Amber appears only on score badges. No purple gradients, no second brand hue on buttons.

rules.name: The Thumbnail Wins Rule
rules.body: On video cards, color comes from the thumbnail and its gradient scrim — never from decorative UI frames around the media.

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce a second sans-serif. Pairing happens through weight and size, not font mixing.

rules.name: The Flat Chrome Rule
rules.body: Navigation rails and shell backgrounds stay flat — no shadow on the sidebar canvas. Shadows belong on elevated white surfaces only.

dos: Do keep the shell at #f4f5f7 and panels at white — the contrast defines the workspace.
Do use emerald for every primary action and active navigation state.
Do let video thumbnails dominate color in the main content area.
Do use dashboard-ease transitions (300ms, cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)) for hover and state changes.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion — disable card enter, glass pulse, and typing dot animations.
Do write UI copy in clear Russian; keep labels short for narrow mobile nav.
donts: Don't build noisy social-feed UI — no infinite-scroll chaos, loud colors, or attention-bait chrome.
Don't use generic SaaS templates — cream dashboards, purple gradient heroes, interchangeable metric cards.
Don't ship AI-template tells — gradient text, eyebrow kickers on every section, identical icon-card grids, side-stripe accent borders.
Don't default to glassmorphism on panels; glass pulse is for thumbnail loading only.
Don't add a second accent color for navigation or marketing surfaces.
Don't use muted gray (zinc-400 and lighter) for body text on tinted backgrounds — bump toward ink.
